parameters.name: countries
parameters.value: ={{ ['latvia','lithuania','belarus','poland','russia','finland'].filter((country) => ({ latvia: $json.useLatvia, lithuania: $json.useLithuania, belarus: $json.useBelarus, poland: $json.usePoland, russia: $json.useRussia, finland: $json.useFinlandContextOnly })[country]).join(',') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: $env.OPENAI_MODEL || 'gpt-5-mini', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'species_prediction_analysis', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['analysisVersion','insightSummary','confidenceNote','warnings','rerankedTopPredictedPoints','consistencyChecks'], properties: { analysisVersion: { type: 'string', const: 'openai_v1' }, insightSummary: { type: 'string' }, confidenceNote: { type: 'string' }, warnings: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }, rerankedTopPredictedPoints: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['rank','name','countyOrParish','lat','lon','confidence','eta','searchRadiusKm','habitatCue','reason'], properties: { rank: { type: 'integer' }, name: { type: 'string' }, countyOrParish: { type: 'string' }, lat: { type: 'number' }, lon: { type: 'number' }, confidence: { type: 'number' }, eta: { type: 'string' }, searchRadiusKm: { type: 'number' }, habitatCue: { type: 'string' }, reason: { type: 'string' } } } }, consistencyChecks: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['routeLooksPlausible','timingLooksPlausible','weatherLooksSupportive','foreignPressureMatchesNarrative'], properties: { routeLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, timingLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, weatherLooksSupportive: { type: 'boolean' }, foreignPressureMatchesNarrative: { type: 'boolean' } } } } } } }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are refining a species prediction for Estonian birding. Use only the provided evidence. Never invent countries, sightings, coordinates, or hotspots. You may only rerank or adjust the provided candidate points. If evidence is contradictory, say so briefly. Keep the summary short, concrete, and useful for birding decisions.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ instructions: { summaryStyle: $json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryStyle || 'field_use', summaryMaxLength: Number($json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryMaxLength || 450), allowedCoordinatesOnly: true, candidatePointsMustRemainSubsetOfProvidedPoints: true }, evidence: $json.openAIAnalysisInput || {} }) }] }) }}
